document.source_title: Largest catch-up initiative delivers over 100 million childhood vaccinations

claims.claim_text: The Big Catch-Up has delivered over 100 million vaccine doses to an estimated 18.3 million children across 36 countries.
claims.evidence_text: The Big Catch-Up, launched during World Immunization Week 2023, has delivered over 100 million vaccine doses to an estimated 18.3 million children across 36 countries.

entities.name: The Big Catch-Up
entities.description: A historic multi-year, multi-country effort to address vaccination declines driven largely by the COVID-19 pandemic.
entities.evidence_text: The Big Catch-Up (BCU), a historic multi-year, multi-country effort to address vaccination declines driven largely by the COVID-19 pandemic.

entities.name: Gavi, the Vaccine Alliance
entities.description: An organization that helps vaccinate more than half the world’s children against some of the world’s deadliest diseases.
entities.evidence_text: Gavi, the Vaccine Alliance (Gavi), WHO, and UNICEF at the start of World Immunization Week.

entities.name: World Health Organization
entities.description: The UN agency for health that leads global efforts to give everyone an equal chance at a safe and healthy life.
entities.evidence_text: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Director-General of the World Health Organization.

entities.name: UNICEF
entities.description: The United Nations agency for children that works to protect the rights of every child.

events.event: Launch of The Big Catch-Up during World Immunization Week
events.evidence_text: The Big Catch-Up, launched during World Immunization Week 2023.

events.event: Conclusion of The Big Catch-Up initiative

metrics.name: Total vaccine doses delivered
metrics.evidence_text: The Big Catch-Up has delivered over 100 million vaccine doses to an estimated 18.3 million children across 36 countries.

metrics.name: Number of zero-dose children reached
metrics.evidence_text: Around 12.3 million were “zero-dose children” who had not previously received any vaccines.

citations.title: Largest catch-up initiative delivers over 100 million childhood vaccinations

source_credibility.reason: The source is from the World Health Organization, a reputable international health agency.
